messages.content:
Create a skill with comprehensive trigger phrases:
- title: "Test Writing"
- type: skill
- scope: global
- description: "Write unit tests using pytest with proper coverage"
- skill_level: intermediate
- triggers: 
  - "write tests"
  - "add tests"
  - "test coverage"
  - "pytest"
  - "unit test"
  - "testing"
- required_tools: ["pytest"]

Use notes_create with payload wrapper.

```python
notes_create({
    "title": "Test Writing",
    "type": "skill",
    "scope": "global",
    "description": "Write unit tests using pytest with proper coverage",
    "skill_level": "intermediate",
    "triggers": [
        "write tests",
        "add tests",
        "test coverage",
        "pytest",
        "unit test",
        "testing"
    ],
    "required_tools": [
        "pytest"
    ]
})
```
